# Diagflo

> Diagflo is an AI-powered diagram generation tool. Describe your architecture, system design, or workflow in plain language and get a professional diagram in seconds.

Diagflo is available at: https://diagflo.yashvardhan.dev

## Features

- **AI-Powered Generation**: Describe what you want in any language. Archie (the AI builder) generates Mermaid.js and Chart.js diagrams automatically.
- **Supported Diagram Types**: Flowcharts, sequence diagrams, class diagrams, ER diagrams, state diagrams, Gantt charts, pie charts, mind maps, Git graphs, and advanced Chart.js visualizations (scatter, line, bar with log scales and annotations).
- **Image-to-Diagram**: Upload a photo of a whiteboard sketch or hand-drawn diagram and convert it into a clean, editable diagram.
- **Iterative Refinement**: Chat with Archie to refine your diagram with follow-up prompts.
- **Export Options**: Export diagrams as SVG, PNG, or copy the raw Mermaid/Chart.js code.
- **Shareable Links**: Generate a unique URL to share any diagram — no login required.
- **Privacy First**: Your API key stays in your browser. Diagrams are generated client-side. No data stored on Diagflo's servers.
- **Dark and Light Theme**: Full theme support across the entire application.
- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Power-user shortcuts for fast workflow.

## How It Works

1. Enter your Gemini API key (stored only in your browser's localStorage).
2. Describe what you want to visualize in the chat prompt.
3. Archie generates the diagram using Mermaid.js or Chart.js depending on the complexity.
4. Refine with follow-up prompts, export, or share via link.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- **Diagram Rendering**: Mermaid.js, Chart.js
- **AI**: Google Gemini API (user provides their own key)
- **Hosting**: Vercel
- **Sharing**: Supabase (for shareable diagram links)
